description: Synthetic batch of 5 short emails for daily briefing triage. NOT real emails. Each is plausible but invented.
user_query: Triage these emails for the daily briefing. Apply the INCLUDE/EXCLUDE classifier. For each email return: (1) include in briefing yes/no, (2) one-sentence summary, (3) any action items.
source_content:
EMAIL 1
From: research@infrainvestordaily.com
Subject: Catalyst podcast — new episode on flexible data centers
Body: New 38-min episode dropped this morning featuring two GP partners discussing the rise of flexible data centers and behind-the-meter power. Worth a listen for anyone watching the captive power thesis. Link to transcript attached.

---

EMAIL 2
From: jane.recruiter@searchpartners.com
Subject: MD role at Tier 1 infrastructure GP — interested?
Body: Hi Yoni, I'm running a confidential search for a Managing Director, Power & Utilities at a top-tier infrastructure GP. $25B+ AUM, North American mandate. Your background fits. Are you open to a 30-min conversation this week?

---

EMAIL 3
From: john.jovanovic@exim.gov
Subject: Catch-up call this Friday?
Body: Yoni — Brian mentioned you might want to reconnect on the EXIM project finance pipeline. I have Friday 2pm or 3pm open. Let me know what works.

---

EMAIL 4
From: ic-team@stonepeak.com
Subject: Term sheet — Project Aurora
Body: Per our call yesterday, attached is the revised term sheet for Project Aurora. Note the change to the management roll-over structure. We'd like to get to signed LOI by next Friday. Please review and revert.

---

EMAIL 5
From: substack@distributedgrid.com
Subject: Weekly digest — DER aggregation in CAISO
Body: This week's deep dive: how Sunrun and Tesla are quietly building the largest DER aggregations in CAISO, and what it means for capacity market design. Plus: short note on FERC Order 2222 implementation status by RTO.
